name: Rosemary Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken breasts with lemon juice, lemon peel, honey, vegetable oil, and chopped rosemary. Marinate for 30 minutes to several hours.
2. Cover the marinated chicken and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
3. Remove the cover and continue baking for another 20 minutes.
- If using bone-in chicken breasts, reduce baking time to 15 minutes covered and 15 minutes uncovered with boneless chicken breast fillets.
